notes: Applied to every entry in inventories/ui-component.json. {name}/{slug}/{path} interpolate from the item; {module_gates} splices the module's gate list from modules.json. Item overrides: skip_steps, overrides.<step>.complexity/milestone.

steps.title: Implement {name} component
steps.description: Build {name} at {path} per 04-DESIGN-LANGUAGE.md tokens and component contract; props typed; no hardcoded user-facing strings (use i18n keys).
acceptance_criteria: renders per design contract in light and dark

steps.title: Design and implement loading/empty/error states for {name}
steps.description: Add explicit loading, empty, and error visual states for {name}; error states surface a recovery action, never a dead end.
acceptance_criteria: all three states reachable and visually intentional
error state offers retry or guidance

steps.title: Accessibility pass on {name} (WCAG 2.2 AA)
steps.description: Keyboard reachability, visible focus, semantic roles/labels, contrast >= AA, hit targets >= 44px touch, prefers-reduced-motion respected for {name}.
acceptance_criteria: axe/pa11y scan clean on component story

steps.title: Externalize and key all strings in {name}
steps.description: Move every user-facing string in {name} to the i18n layer with stable namespaced keys; ICU plurals where counts appear; verify +40% text expansion does not break layout.

steps.title: RTL/logical-properties audit for {name}
steps.description: Replace physical CSS properties with logical ones in {name}; verify mirrored rendering under dir=rtl; flag directional icons.

steps.title: Unit tests for {name}
steps.description: Unit-test {name} logic and state transitions including loading/empty/error and edge props.

steps.title: Visual regression snapshots for {name}
steps.description: Add visual regression coverage for {name}: default/hover/focus/disabled plus loading/empty/error, light and dark.
acceptance_criteria: snapshots exist for all states x themes

steps.title: Performance budget check for {name}
steps.description: Measure {name} against 07-PERFORMANCE-PLAN.md budgets on the reference low-tier device profile (render cost, re-render count, bundle contribution); fix or split if over.
acceptance_criteria: within per-surface budget on baseline profile

steps.title: Motion/micro-interaction polish for {name}
steps.description: Apply the motion language from 04-DESIGN-LANGUAGE.md to {name} state changes; feedback-driven, not decorative; reduced-motion variant included.

steps.title: Error telemetry for {name}
steps.description: Capture real errors surfaced through {name} with area/severity/context breadcrumbs per the project telemetry (SRS-equivalent) rules; no silent catches.
acceptance_criteria: error path emits telemetry with area+severity

steps.title: Document {name} usage and states
steps.description: Add {name} to the component docs/storybook: props, states, do/don't, a11y notes.
acceptance_criteria: docs entry with live example per state
